articles.summary: TL;DR Google has revealed Android 17’s foldable gaming mode in action, showing how it tackles one of the biggest pain points of gaming on foldable phones. Players can customize the controller layout, size, theme, button positioning, and haptic feedback to better fit different hand sizes and play styles. Foldable phones have always faced a huge ergonomic wall when it comes to mobile gaming. articles.title: Google thinks Gemini can fix one of studying’s biggest problems
articles.summary: TL;DR Google’s new Gemini study notebooks create a personalized study plan by analyzing your uploaded notes, syllabus, and course materials. The feature generates targeted lessons, follow-up quizzes, and a progress dashboard that tracks strengths, weak areas, and exam readiness over time. Study notebooks also supports standardized test prep for exams such as the SAT, JEE, NEET, and GRE. Students have been finding creative ways to use AI tools for months. Some use it to summarize chapters they don’t want to read, others rely on it for homework help, last-minute revision, or explaining concepts that their textbooks somehow made more confusing. While AI can speed up homework and explainers, it doesn’t always tell students what they should be studying in the first place. That’s the gap Google

Tickets can now display real-time updates, such as schedule changes, entry instructions, directions, and other event information, directly in Google Wallet. The feature could reduce the need to jump between emails, apps, and websites by keeping key event details and services in one place. Google Wallet has evolved into much more than a place to store credit cards. It already keeps track of boarding passes, movie tickets, loyalty cards, and concert tickets, often pulling them directly from Gmail. If you’ve ever received a gate change notification while rushing through an airport, you’ve already seen how useful that can be.

articles.title: Forget 2nm chips! IBM just beat TSMC to sub-nm chip design
articles.summary: TL;DR IBM is showing of a sub-nm architecture, having created a 3D “nanostack” design at the 0.7nm node. The technology builds vertical towers of transistors, staggering their placement, to increase density. IBM believes that its design could be ready for production with the next 5 years. Only a few years back, we were still looking forward to smartphone chips manufactured on a 2nm process as the next big thing. Fabrication advancements have now made 2nm chips a reality — so what’s next? Engineers have already been pushing the limits of physics for a while now, and although they’re probably going to come up against a wall at some point, we’re not there quite yet, as IBM announces its new 0.7nm solution. A smaller and smaller fabrication level isn’t the only factor that impacts chip perform

articles.summary_zh: 這台 Peloton 類似的划船機將你的鍛煉遊戲化，現在 Prime Day 期間享受高達 25% 的折扣。

articles.summary_zh: Tesla 駕駛輔助功能 Full Self-Driving (Supervised) 是否在一名女性的死亡事件中扮演了角色？

articles.title: The Aerogarden I Recommend to Everyone Is Just $83 Right Now, a 63 Percent Discount
articles.summary: This flash deal is a rare chance to buy one of our favorite hydroponic gardens for less than $100.
articles.title_zh: 我推薦給所有人的 Aerogarden 現在只要 $83，降價 63%
articles.summary_zh: 這是一次難得的閃購機會，可以以不到 $100 的價格購買我們最喜歡的水培花園。

articles.title: More Expensive iPhones on the Horizon?
articles.summary: Bloomberg Intelligence says Apple has to hike prices for its iPhones after raising prices for its Macs, iPads and home devices. Those hikes went into effect globally on Thursday. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana spoke with Bloomberg's Yvonne Man and Avril Hong on "Bloomberg: The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 更貴的 iPhone 即將來臨？
articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg Intelligence 表示 Apple 在提高 Mac、iPad 和家庭設備價格後，必須提高 iPhone 價格，這些漲價已於週四全球生效。

articles.title: Apple Price Hikes Spark Asia Tech Selloff on Memory Cost Concern
articles.summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple raised prices for its products, stoking concern that rising component prices will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.
articles.title_zh: Apple 提價引發亞洲科技股拋售，引發芯片成本擔憂
articles.summary_zh: Apple 提高產品價格後亞洲科技股下跌，引發對上升的元件價格將抑制設備需求並最終放緩 AI 交易驅動的芯片漲幅的擔憂。

articles.title: GCash Owner Seeks Up to $1.5 Billion in Record Philippine IPO
articles.summary: The company behind the Philippines’ biggest mobile wallet GCash is preparing what may become the country’s biggest initial public offering ever, seeking to raise as much as 92.3 billion pesos ($1.5 billion).
articles.title_zh: GCash 母公司尋求籌資 15 億美元，創菲律賓 IPO 紀錄
articles.summary_zh: 菲律賓最大移動錢包 GCash 背後的公司正準備進行可能是菲律賓有史以來最大的 IPO，目標融資高達 923 億披索（15 億美元）。

articles.title: Samsung, SK Hynix Reportedly Preparing Huge AI Spending Push
articles.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. are preparing to announce hundreds of billions of dollars worth in new investments on Monday, according to South Korean media reports this week.
articles.title_zh: 三星、SK 海力士據報準備大規模 AI 支出計劃
articles.summary_zh: 三星電子和 SK 海力士據韓國媒體報導，準備在週一宣布數千億美元的新投資計劃。

articles.title: Drone Startup Elroy Air Is Said to Near $800 Million SPAC Deal
articles.summary: Elroy Air Inc., a cargo drone startup aiming to replace delivery trucks, is in advanced talks to go public through a merger with a blank-check vehicle that will create a company with an enterprise value of about $1 billion.
articles.title_zh: 無人機初創公司 Elroy Air 據稱接近 8 億美元 SPAC 交易
articles.summary_zh: 貨運無人機初創公司 Elroy Air 正在進行高級談判，計劃通過與空白支票公司合併上市，創建企業價值約 10 億美元的公司。

articles.title: Korean Stocks Tumble 9% on Chip Selloff, Triggers Trading Halt
articles.summary: South Korean stocks were hit by a second trading suspension this week as chipmakers plunged, highlighting the market’s sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment.
articles.title_zh: 韓國股市因芯片拋售下跌 9%，觸發交易暫停
articles.summary_zh: 韓國股市本週遭遇第二次交易暫停，芯片製造商暴跌，凸顯市場對全球 AI 情緒波動的敏感性。

articles.title: Apple Supplier Lingyi Rises in HK After $1.1 Billion Debut
articles.summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese electronic supplier for Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc., rose in its Hong Kong debut after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.
articles.title_zh: Apple 供應商凌雍在港首日上漲
articles.summary_zh: Apple 和 Tesla 的中國電子供應商凌雍科技在香港首日交易中上漲，此前在股票發行中籌集了 83 億港元（11 億美元）。

articles.title: SoftBank Shares Tumble After Report of OpenAI’s IPO Delay
articles.summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s stock fell as much as 13% on concerns that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year and delay returns for its Japanese backer.
articles.title_zh: 軟銀股價在 OpenAI IPO 延期報導後暴跌
articles.summary_zh: 軟銀集團股票因 OpenAI 可能將 IPO 推遲至明年的擔憂而最多下跌 13%，這將延遲該日本公司的回報。

articles.title: China’s Hardware Tech Stocks Look to Earnings to Sustain Rally
articles.summary: Chinese hardware technology stocks have been on a tear. The next challenge is showing the earnings to back it up.
articles.title_zh: 中國硬件科技股寄望於財報來維持漲勢
articles.summary_zh: 中國硬件科技股一直在上升，下一個挑戰是展示相應的盈利數字來支撐這一漲勢。

articles.title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Stagger AI Model Release
articles.summary: The Trump administration has asked OpenAI to stagger the release of an upcoming powerful artificial intelligence model, according to a person familiar with the matter, nearly two weeks after rival Anthropic PBC suspended its most capable offerings from the market under regulatory pressure.
articles.title_zh: 川普政府要求 OpenAI 分階段推出 AI 模型
articles.summary_zh: 據知情人士透露，川普政府已要求 OpenAI 分階段推出即將推出的強大 AI 模型，這發生在競爭對手 Anthropic 在監管壓力下暫停其最強大產品上市約兩週後。

articles.title: Musk Starts Expanding X Payments to More Users After Delay
articles.summary: Elon Musk is expanding access to digital payment venture X Money to a subset of premium users on social network X, part of his bid to turn the platform into an “everything app.”
articles.title_zh: 馬斯克延期後開始擴展 X Payments 到更多用戶
articles.summary_zh: 埃隆·馬斯克正在為社交網絡 X 上的高級用戶子集擴展數字支付商業 X Money 的訪問權限，作為他將該平台變為「超級應用」的努力的一部分。

articles.title: H.B. Fuller Agrees to Acquire UK-Listed AMS for £659 Million
articles.summary: H.B. Fuller Co. agreed to acquire Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc, a British maker of tissue-healing medical products, for £659 million ($870 million).
articles.title_zh: H.B. Fuller 同意以 6.59 億英鎊收購英國上市公司 AMS
articles.summary_zh: H.B. Fuller 公司同意以 6.59 億英鎊（8.7 億美元）收購英國組織修復醫療產品製造商 Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc。

articles.title: Pentagon Sees Bigger Role for AI in Setting Military Targets
articles.summary: The Pentagon has quietly revised its doctrine on how the US military picks its targets in battle, opening the way for artificial intelligence to make critical wartime decisions in the future.
articles.title_zh: 五角大廈看好 AI 在軍事目標設置中的更大作用
articles.summary_zh: 五角大廈已悄悄修改其關於美軍如何在戰鬥中選擇目標的軍事學說，為 AI 在未來做出關鍵作戰決定的道路鋪平。

articles.title: Consumer Side of AI Currently Underweighted, Says Mark Pincus
articles.summary: Zynga founder Mark Pincus said that the consumer side of AI is being underweighted in comparison to the engineering and coding aspects of the technology and that capping the consumer influence is not in line with the the way the internet has developed. Pincus said that while most of AI is still a 'single player experience,' it is going to massively change our labor market and economy as it further develops. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 消費者端 AI 目前被低估，馬克·平克斯稱
articles.summary_zh: Zynga 創始人馬克·平克斯表示，AI 的消費者端被低估了，相比之下工程和編碼方面被高估了，限制消費者影響力與互聯網的發展方式不符。

articles.title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
articles.summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 消費者感到「巨大壓力」但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看好前景
articles.summary_zh: Bed Bath & Beyond CEO Amy Sullivan 表示消費者感到「巨大壓力」，但公司的展望是如果他們能在低點進行業務，未來會有很大的上升空間。

articles.title: OpenAI Leans Toward Waiting Until 2027 for IPO, NYT Says
articles.summary: OpenAI is leaning toward holding off on an initial public offering until 2027, the New York Times reported, citing three people involved in the company’s deliberations.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 傾向於等到 2027 年才進行 IPO，紐約時報報導
articles.summary_zh: 據紐約時報報導，OpenAI 傾向於將 IPO 推遲至 2027 年，此信息來自三位涉及公司審議的人士。

articles.title: Chipmaker Onsemi to Buy Synaptics in $6 Billion Stock Deal
articles.summary: US chipmaker Onsemi has agreed to buy Synaptics Inc., a firm that specializes in semiconductors for smart devices, in an all-stock deal that values the company at about $6.2 billion.
articles.title_zh: 芯片製造商 Onsemi 以 60 億美元股票交易收購 Synaptics
articles.summary_zh: 美國芯片製造商 Onsemi 同意以全股票交易收購專門從事智能設備半導體的 Synaptics Inc.，交易估值約 62 億美元。

articles.title: Why South Korea’s AI Stock Mania Is a Warning
articles.summary: South Korea’s stock market has surged about 200% year-on-year, powered by an AI-fueled chip rally. But extreme volatility and heavy reliance on two companies may mean it’s a bubble waiting to burst. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 為什麼韓國 AI 股票熱潮是一個警告
articles.summary_zh: 韓國股市同比飆升約 200%，由 AI 驅動的芯片漲幅推動，但極端波動性和對兩家公司的沉重依賴可能意味著這是一個泡沫即將破裂。

articles.title: Tenstorrent CEO on Next Leg of AI Tech, Deal Interest
articles.summary: Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller discusses AI buildout and what’s next for chips. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Tenstorrent CEO 談論 AI 技術下一階段和交易興趣
articles.summary_zh: Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller 討論 AI 建設和芯片的下一步，在 Bloomberg 的「The Close」節目中發表觀點。

articles.title: Apple Podcasts’ Video Push Shows Early Promise
articles.summary: Apple charged into video podcasts earlier this year after ceding market share to YouTube. Shows that opted in early are cautiously optimistic about the results.
articles.title_zh: Apple Podcasts 視頻推送顯示早期成果
articles.summary_zh: Apple 今年早些時候進軍視頻播客，以彌補向 YouTube 的市場份額流失，早期選擇加入的節目對結果持謹慎樂觀態度。

articles.title: JPMorgan's Aliaga : Seeing Whipsaw In Markets Around AI
articles.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Stephanie Aliaga discusses the current whipsaw in markets surrounding AI and gives her outlook on what’s ahead. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 摩根大通 Aliaga：看到 AI 周邊市場鞭撻
articles.summary_zh: 摩根大通資產管理全球市場策略師 Stephanie Aliaga 討論圍繞 AI 的當前市場波動，並對前景進行展望，在 Bloomberg 的「The Close」節目中發表觀點。

articles.title: Trump to Pick Telecom Lawyer to Lead DOJ’s Antitrust Division
articles.summary: The White House is poised to nominate Adam Candeub, the general counsel at the Federal Communications Commission, to take over as the Justice Department’s antitrust chief, according to people familiar with the plans.
articles.title_zh: 川普提名電信律師領導司法部反壟斷部門
articles.summary_zh: 據知情人士透露，白宮即將提名聯邦通信委員會首席律師 Adam Candeub 接任司法部反壟斷首席一職。

articles.title: US Invests $250 Million in Billionaire’s Startup for Chip Making
articles.summary: I-Pulse Inc. will receive $250 million in US funding for semiconductor and pulsed-power development as the venture co-founded by Robert Friedland joins American efforts to reduce reliance on foreign-chip supply chains.
articles.title_zh: 美國投資 2.5 億美元於億萬富翁初創公司用於芯片製造
articles.summary_zh: I-Pulse Inc. 將獲得美國 2.5 億美元的半導體和脈衝功率開發資金，該公司由 Robert Friedland 共同創立，參與美國減少對外國芯片供應鏈依賴的努力。

articles.title: Microsoft Raises Xbox Prices for Third Time in 13 Months
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. announced a third substantial price increase for the company’s current-generation Xbox video-game consoles in a glaring example of the component shortage crisis that has universally driven up the cost of consumer tech products.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 在13個月內第三次提高Xbox價格
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft宣佈對其現代遊戲主機進行第三次重大漲價，這反映了全球零件短缺危機對消費科技產品成本的普遍推高。

articles.title: Google to Lose High-Profile AI Staffers to Rival Anthropic
articles.summary: Two leading AI researchers at Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic, according to sources, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI. Bloomberg's Julia Love joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Google高調AI員工流向競爭對手Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: Google的兩位領先AI研究人員計劃轉投競爭對手Anthropic，這加重了該搜尋巨頭在AI領域地位面臨的威脅。

articles.title: Waymo Registers German Entity for Future European Expansion
articles.summary: Waymo is planning to offer its driverless robotaxis in Germany, the latest move by the Alphabet Inc. unit to expand outside the US.
articles.title_zh: Waymo在德國註冊實體以推進歐洲擴展
articles.summary_zh: Alphabet旗下的Waymo計劃在德國提供無人駕駛共乘服務，這是其在美國以外地區擴張的最新舉措。

articles.title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data-Center Spending Boom, Report Says
articles.summary: Revenue from AI has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View. Azeem Azhar, founder of Exponential View, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the findings of this report. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI銷售開始為數據中心支出熱潮帶來回報
articles.summary_zh: 根據研究機構Exponential View的報告，AI收入已達到臨界點，科技公司投入的數千億美元支出可能在經濟上是可持續的。

articles.title: Qualcomm CEO on Data Center Chips, Adding Meta as a Customer
articles.summary: Qualcomm says its expansion into chips for data centers will produce “billions” in revenue in the fiscal year that begins in October, suggesting the company is gaining a foothold in the booming market for AI gear. Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon joins Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Qualcomm執行長談數據中心晶片與Meta客戶增長
articles.summary_zh: Qualcomm表示其數據中心晶片業務在10月開始的財年將產生數十億美元收入，顯示該公司在AI設備繁榮市場中站穩腳跟。

articles.title: Microsoft adds another year to Windows 10 extended update program
articles.summary: Microsoft ended official support for Windows 10 in 2025, but the company may have a harder time than expected putting the operating system out to pasture. After promising a year of optional extended update support, Microsoft has changed its policy, tacking on another year to its Extended Security Updates (ESU) program. If you are still clinging to Windows 10, you don't have to do anything but enjoy that extra year. The last regular updates rolled out to Windows 10 in October of last year, but the Internet can be a dangerous place for unpatched Windows machines. That was a problem for Microsoft, as Windows 11 usage had only barely surpassed Windows 10 when support ended. Microsoft's solution was to give everyone on the old OS a free year of extended updates. That program was set to end on O
articles.title_zh: Microsoft延長Windows 10擴展更新支援計畫一年
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft在2025年終止了Windows 10官方支援，但該公司在逐步淘汰該作業系統時面臨困難，因此延長了擴展安全更新期限。

articles.title: FCC may kill $2B program that connects schools and libraries to Internet
articles.summary: The Federal Communications Commission was roundly criticized today for proposing to scale back or eliminate E-Rate, a $2 billion-a-year Universal Service program that provides discounts for telecom services and equipment in schools and libraries. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr said E-Rate should be changed because students are getting too much screen time. He led a 2-1 vote to issue a Notice of Proposed Rulemaking (NPRM) that proposes changes and asks the public to comment on them. "Over the last decade, school districts across the country experimented with a massive increase in screen time for students," Carr said at today's meeting. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: FCC可能終止20億美元學校和圖書館網路連接計畫
articles.summary_zh: 聯邦通訊委員會因提議縮減或終止E-Rate計畫（年度20億美元的普遍服務計畫，為學校和圖書館提供電信服務折扣）而遭批評。

articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.summary: In February 2024, Notion bought Skiff , an encrypted email and productivity software startup. Within a year, Notion shut down Skiff’s email service (taking @skiff.com email addresses with it). And in April 2025, the San Francisco-based company released Notion Mail, a Gmail client primarily built by people who joined Notion through the Skiff acquisition. Today, Notion announced that it’s shutting down Notion Mail, effectively killing what little remained of Skiff email. In an X post ( first spotted by 9to5Mac ) today, Notion said that it will shutter the Notion Mail “inbox across web, desktop, and iOS on September 22.” The post claimed that most Notion users don’t use email clients anyway and instead rely on AI agents to handle their electronic correspondence. It reads: Read full article Co
articles.title_zh: Notion關閉受Skiff啟發的電郵應用，因大多用戶改用AI代理
articles.summary_zh: Notion在2024年2月收購加密電郵軟體Skiff，但在一年內關閉了其電郵服務，隨後於2025年4月推出了以AI為中心的Notion Mail。

articles.title: Google finally releases a Finance Android app, promises iOS version later in 2026
articles.summary: Google Finance is not a new product—it has been around for 20 years, long enough that it initially relied on Flash to display charts and graphs. The website has gotten a few major updates over the years, but it has never had a mobile app until now. Google has released the first standalone app for Google Finance, which is currently exclusive to Android, with iOS planned for later this year. The app is available globally in the Play Store , but that's not the only update to Google's financial tracker. The AI-powered makeover for the Finance website is also leaving beta, making Google's chatbot a core part of the experience. Naturally, the mobile app includes a heaping helping of generative AI that aims to make sense of irrational financial markets. If you've checked out the new Finance web e
articles.title_zh: Google終於推出Finance Android應用，承諾2026年推出iOS版本
articles.summary_zh: Google Finance已存在20年，但直到現在才推出首個獨立行動應用，承諾稍後在2026年發布iOS版本。

articles.title: Anthropic says Alibaba must be punished for largest Claude cloning attack
articles.summary: Anthropic has accused the Chinese firm Alibaba of launching the largest attack yet attempting to clone Claude, as China races to match the capabilities of Anthropic's leading model following Mythos' release and subsequent restriction from foreign markets . Ars obtained a June 10 letter sent to Senators Tim Scott (R-SC) and Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) one day ahead of a Senate committee hearing on “AI and the American Dream.” In the letter, Anthropic shared “new, confidential evidence of the largest campaign to illicitly extract Claude’s capabilities we have ever measured.” The attacks occurred between April 22 and June 5, when “operators afﬁliated with Alibaba and Alibaba Qwen, Alibaba’s AI lab” allegedly generated “more than 28.8 million exchanges with Claude through almost 25,000 fraudule
articles.title_zh: Anthropic指控阿里巴巴發動規模最大的Claude複製攻擊
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic指控中國企業阿里巴巴發動最大規模的Claude複製攻擊，中國正競力比肩Anthropic在模型能力方面的領先地位。

articles.title: Planet orbits so close to its star that their magnetic fields connect
articles.summary: For most of human history, our view of "close to the Sun" was defined by the orbit of Mercury, with its 88-day orbit and barren, baking surface. But from the moment we started discovering exoplanets, it became very clear that our own Solar System was anything but a guide to the rest of the galaxy. Planets with orbits only a few days long are strikingly common, with the proximity to the star creating things that seem bizarre from our perspective: metal vapor in the atmosphere, or atmospheres puffed out to ridiculously low densities. Now, we can apparently add an additional oddity: overlapping magnetic fields. Researchers have found a star/planet combo that experiences periodic brightening, which they ascribe to the interactions between the magnetic fields of both bodies. Looking for repetit
articles.title_zh: 行星繞行距離恆星如此近以至磁場相連
articles.summary_zh: 與傳統認知中「最接近太陽」由水星的88日軌道定義不同，系外行星的發現表明我們的太陽系遠非銀河系的參考標準。

articles.title: Klue供應鏈攻擊影響範圍擴大，AI營收情資平臺Gong的用戶也受到波及

articles.summary:

articles.title: 蘋果調漲Mac及iPad等硬體裝置價格，漲幅15%起
articles.summary: 蘋果周四（6/25）調漲了旗下從HomePod、iPad、MacBook到iMac的價格，漲幅從15%到25%不等，臺灣蘋果線上商店的價格也已同步調漲，13吋MacBook Air的新售價為42,900元新臺幣，上周還只有35,900元新臺幣，一口氣漲了7,000元。此波蘋果硬體產品調漲並未波及iPhone。微軟亦於同一天宣布自8月1日起於全球調漲Xbox遊戲主機售價。

articles.title: Grafana Labs證實受TanStack NPM供應鏈攻擊波及，GitHub儲存庫遭未授權存取
articles.summary: 可觀測性平臺業者Grafana Labs於5月16日確認，該公司GitHub儲存庫遭未授權存取，攻擊者下載程式碼並提出勒索要求。後續調查指出，事件源自TanStack NPM供應鏈攻擊中的Mini Shai-Hulud活動。Grafana Labs於5月27日完成內部調查，6月23日進一步發布事後檢討報告，說明事件限於GitHub環境，客戶正式環境與Grafana Cloud平臺並未受影響。

articles.title: CISA將思科整合通訊管理平臺Unified CM重大漏洞列KEV
articles.summary: 6月22日威脅情報公司Defused Cyber警告，他們偵測到有人首度利用伺服器請求偽造（SSRF）漏洞CVE-2026-20230的跡象，此弱點存在於思科整合通訊管理平臺Unified Communications Manager（Unified CM）與Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition（Unified CM SME），CVSS風險評為8.6分，不過由於該漏洞能讓攻擊者得到root權限，思科認定其嚴重程度為重大等級。如今美國政府也證實，該漏洞已被用於實際攻擊活動。

articles.title: Chip Industry Week In Review
articles.summary: IBM unveiled a 7Å transistor architecture that uses staggered nanosheet transistors stacked on a precisely beveled angle, almost like tiles on a roof. That allows more transistors to be crammed into a given area, boosting performance by 50% or power efficiency by up to 70%. Perhaps even more important, IBM claims a 40% improvement in SRAM scaling, which is orders of magnitude faster and lower latency than HBM. Mass production is slated for ~2031. Fig. 1: Huiming Bu, IBM VP of Semiconductor Global R&D, shows a staggered GAA transistor model for stacking logic. Source: IBM Also on the extreme scaling front, the U. of Tokyo created 1nm semiconducting molybdenum disulfide nanotubes for potential use in ultra-scaled GAA transistors. That said, if you need a smart speaker to handle smart home control, casual mu

But, anecdotally, I’ve noticed that this wearable genre is slowly falling out of vogue. We expected several brands to join this group in the coming months and years, potentially including Apple and Google, but the latter has resorted to something entirely different in the meantime. The Fitbit Air is a screenless band that trades the wearer’s finger for their wrist; it’s certainly not a smart ring. But this begs the question: are consumers happy with this device, or would they prefer a Google smart ring as well?

articles.title: AWS, Microsoft and Google agree the session is the new unit of compute. They disagree on how to isolate it.
articles.summary: Over the past few months , four AI giants quietly rebuilt the same thing at once: AWS, Microsoft, Google, and Anthropic each shipped agent runtime updates that point to the same architectural shift. Microsoft rebuilt its Foundry-hosted agents in April around per-session isolation. Anthropic’s Managed Agents virtualize the agent into a session, a harness, and a sandbox. AWS routes each session to its own microVM, and Google isolates agent code execution in a dedicated sandbox. The common pattern is not another model feature or developer tool. It is a move from request-level load balancing to session-aware execution. This matters because enterprise agents are not ordinary API calls. They are long-running, stateful, tool-using processes that often run code influenced by user input. At its cor
articles.title_zh: AWS、Microsoft 和 Google 同意 session 是新的計算單位。但他們在如何隔離它上有分歧。

articles.title: Your engineering org needs an AI slop registry
articles.summary: AI coding tools don’t just help engineers write code faster. They help engineers make the same mistake faster, at scale, across every PR that touches a given pattern. I’m not talking about AI code that’s obviously wrong; I’m talking about code that compiles, passes basic checks, and looks plausible but is subtly wrong, bloated, or misaligned with what was actually needed. In practice, that usually looks like AI overengineering the abstraction layer for a problem that needs 10 lines, code that ignores your repo’s patterns, naming, or architecture, calls to APIs that don’t exist, or copying patterns without understanding why, like retry logic where it’s not needed. Errors like that are systematic, which is what makes them preventable. You have CLAUDE

articles.title: The AI agent identity problem nobody’s talking about
articles.summary: Many agentic projects can sail through development just fine. Then they hit security review — and that’s where things can grind to a halt. Unclear identity models and overly broad permissions quickly become blockers. You’ve probably seen this play out: A customer support agent is working well; it triages tickets and processes refunds, handles the whole workflow without a hitch. Then security asks a simple question: Under whose identity is this running? The answer stops the process cold: It’s a shared account with broad permission, no clear ownership, no audit trail, and no least-privilege controls in sight. The root issue isn’t complicated. It’s undefined identity and poorly scoped permissions. And that challenge is accelerating fast. Research from the 2

articles.title: Cost of the AI Boom: Anxiety, Longer Hours
articles.summary: One of the promises of AI was alleviating the burdens of work, but the workaholic culture in Silicon Valley hasn't disappeared. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas explains why round-the-clock managing of AI agents and intense competition are driving longer hours and heightened anxiety for tech workers. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI 繁榮的成本：焦慮、更長的工作時間
articles.summary_zh: AI 的承諾之一是減輕工作負擔，但矽谷的工作狂文化並未消失。彭博社的 Natasha Mascarenhas 解釋為什麼 AI 代理的全天候管理和激烈競爭推動了科技工作者更長的工作時間和更高的焦慮。

articles.title: How Geothermal Energy Could Power the AI Boom
articles.summary: Can geothermal energy solve the AI energy crunch? I-Pulse Co-Founder, Chairman and CEO Robert Friedland explains how a $250 million US investment will accelerate breakthrough semiconductor technology designed to drill deep into Earth's heat, delivering around-the-clock clean energy. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to make a case for government-backed industrial policy and why geothermal, and not wind or solar, is the future of America's energy infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 地熱能如何為 AI 熱潮提供動力
articles.summary_zh: 地熱能能解決 AI 能源危機嗎？I-Pulse 聯合創辦人、董事長兼執行長 Robert Friedland 解釋了 2.5 億美元美國投資將如何加速突破性半導體技術，該技術旨在深入鑽入地球熱量，提供全天候清潔能源。

articles.title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Prices
articles.summary:
Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.
Bloomberg Tech Host Ed Ludlow discusses the move from Apple to raise prices as well as what's next for OpenAI as they mull a delay for the company's IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI 成本現實檢驗衝擊亞洲科技股，Apple 提高價格

articles.title: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
articles.summary: Elroy Air is going public at a roughly $1 billion valuation, aiming to replace delivery trucks with long-range cargo drones. CEO Andrew Clare joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how the company’s heavy-payload aircraft works, why public markets are the right funding path and why defense demand and US supply-chain automation make this the ideal moment to scale. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
articles.summary: BlackBerry CEO John Giamatteo discusses the company’s evolution into a software and infrastructure player, centered on its QNX operating system. He highlights that QNX now powers over 275 million vehicles globally and is increasingly used in robotics, medical devices and industrial automation. Giamatteo speaks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger and Alpine Saxon Woods Chief Market Strategist Sarah Hunt on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo 看好 QNX 驅動增長

articles.title: The Cult of the C-Suite Is Officially Over
articles.summary: A decade ago, it seemed like chief executives were broadly admired if not universally beloved. But these days, general sentiment over top executives has significantly shifted. And on top of that, CEOs increasingly complain they are overworked, overstressed and subjected to endless scrutiny. Bloomberg Opinion's Beth Kowitt joins Brad Stone and Max Chafkin on the Everybody's Business podcast to unpack why many top talents are turning down CEO jobs and how the culture shift may impact everyday workers. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.summary: Inside a Walt Disney Co. research and development lab, supported by some heavy-duty scaffolding, sits a wooden manta ray prototype roughly the size of a car. If all goes according to plan, the final version will be able to transform into the Gramma Tala character from Moana, used at a lagoon in a Disney park sometime soon. Down the line, the company will add a fleet of dolphin-like robots to the experience.

articles.title: Ship Struck in Hormuz, Apple's Price Hikes Hit iPads & Macs | The Opening Trade 6/26/2026
articles.summary: A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday in the first reported attack since an interim US-Iran peace deal, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare. Apple shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage. The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

She spoke to Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden on "The Pulse." (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: VW may close four factories to adapt to the future, report says
articles.summary: Volkswagen Group is considering what was previously unthinkable: closing up to four factories in Germany and instituting layoffs that would shrink the workforce by 15 percent. 2025 was a bad year for Europe's largest automaker. Its sales were essentially flat, but profits were anything but, dropping 44 percent to just 6.9 billion euros ($7.9 billion) as operating margins more than halved. The red ink looks set to continue bleeding through 2026, and in March, the company announced it would cut 50,000 jobs in Germany by 2030 as part of a plan to adapt. Now, according to a report in Manager Magazin, those job losses may double. The automaker did well selling EVs in Europe last year, but sales in North America and China fell and continue to fall, and tariffs have had a significant effect. Read

articles.title: Feedbacks upon feedbacks: Rock weathering and the climate
articles.summary: Since the early 1980s , Earth scientists have understood that erosion and weathering of rock slowly removes CO 2 from the atmosphere, regulating Earth’s climate on geological timescales. But recent studies have shown that erosion can also emit CO 2 by oxidizing organic carbon contained in eroding sediments. It hasn’t been clear how this competition between removal by rock weathering and emission by organic carbon weathering ends up affecting Earth’s climate. A new study in the journal Nature Communications uses the geological past to test how these competing effects added up. articles.title_zh: 反饋於反饋：岩石風化與氣候
articles.summary_zh: 自 1980 年代初以來，地球科學家已了解岩石侵蝕和風化如何逐漸從大氣中移除 CO2，調節地質時間尺度上地球氣候。但近期研究表明侵蝕也能通過氧化侵蝕岩石中含有的有機碳而排放 CO2。

articles.title: SpaceX plans to launch Starlink mobile service in the US
articles.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has told investors that it plans to launch a new Starlink mobile service for US consumers, in a move that would upend the country’s multibillion-dollar phone network market. The company’s president and chief operating officer, Gwynne Shotwell, told investors during a recent IPO roadshow that the group was considering launching a Starlink retail product and could build its own terrestrial US mobile network, according to four people familiar with the matter. The move would require Starlink to build a new retail offering by selling mobile contracts to individual customers, competing directly with the three big US network operators Verizon Wireless, AT&T. and T-Mobile. articles.summary: Welcome to Edition 8.47 of the Rocket Report! We have now very nearly reached the midpoint of 2026, a year in which several new US rockets were advertised as potentially making their debuts. articles.title: 台水揭露智慧水務轉型最新進展，導入AI從精準加藥到預測維護，提升供水韌性與減碳效益
articles.summary:
肩負全臺（大臺北部分地區除外）超過700萬戶、約1,800萬人用水的台灣自來水公司(簡稱台水)，旗下管理龐大的供水基礎設施，包括476座淨水場、140個供水系統及逾6萬公里供水管線，每天供應約1,400萬噸自來水，面臨龐大供水設施的複雜管理挑戰、人力不足，加上能源成本上升，以及2050淨零排放目標，加上極端氣候的旱澇不均，讓水資源調度複雜且緊張，台水公司加速導入AI推動數位轉型，發展智慧水務提升供水韌性及滿足永續減碳的目的。
台水近期在股東會上揭露其智慧水務最新進展，顯示AI應用已從單一個別場域試辦，逐步擴展至淨水操作、設備維護、水質監測、客服與工安管理等核心業務，並開始與能源管理及減碳策略整合，期望以此提升供水韌性、營運效率與永續績效。

articles.summary: 南非知名殯葬服務與保險機構AVBOB傳出遭網路攻擊，導致服務中斷與資料外洩。當地ITWeb等商業科技媒體於6月8日報導指出，AVBOB已確認該網路攻擊事件導致其部分服務中斷，並強調各單位仍維持營運，在這段受影響的期間，可透過人工方式辦理付款、理賠登記和喪葬安排等事項。

articles.summary: 英國科技研究平臺Exponential View周四（6/25）發布首份《AI經濟報告》（The State of the AI Economy）報告，試圖衡量生成式AI的真實市場需求。報告指出，若排除重複計算並不含中國市場，生成式AI過去12個月創造1,100億美元營收，最新年化營收規模更突破1,750億美元，顯示AI需求已獲實際支出驗證。
